name: HashKey Group
fullText:
❓ What does identity look like for an AI agent?

HashKey Group Chairman & CEO Dr. Xiao Feng recently shared his perspective in an interview with Wen Wei Po, discussing how AI agents may require fundamentally new identity and financial frameworks.

name: Solar (Solana中文社群)
fullText:
“三年后 Solana 上成熟的自托管方案，将是‘隐形的’。用户甚至不会意识到自己正在与加密技术交互。”

@solflare 的 Co-founder @vidor_solflare 谈及 Solana 上自托管的未来：它将变得无感、隐形，你甚至不会察觉到这背后是加密技术。 https://t.co/kKFxX877gH
